title: Everything You Need to Know About Digital Product Stores with No-KYC Payments
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: You're stuck in Nigeria, trying to sell an ebook on Gumroad, but PayPal's the only payment option. The platform's strict KYC requirements are blocking your customers from buying from you. Or maybe you're in Venezuela, and your bank's limitations are making it impossible to use Stripe. You're not alone – hundreds of digital creators worldwide face similar restrictions. It's time to break free from these limitations and create a digital product store with no-KYC payments. Here's everything you need to know about creating a seamless and secure buying experience for your customers.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

A no-KYC digital product store is an online platform where buyers can purchase digital goods, such as ebooks, courses, and templates, without having to provide personal identification or financial information. This technology is crucial for creators in restricted countries or those who face banking limitations, as it allows them to sell their digital products globally, without worrying about platform restrictions or buyer KYC requirements. With no-KYC payments, you can focus on creating high-quality digital products, while your customers enjoy a secure and frictionless buying experience.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The technology behind no-KYC digital product stores relies on blockchain-based payment processors, such as NOWPayments, which support 300+ cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and USDT. When a buyer makes a purchase, the transaction is processed in real-time, and the digital product is automatically delivered to their wallet. The payment processor ensures that the transaction is secure, and the buyer receives a receipt for their purchase. This process eliminates the need for traditional payment gateways and KYC requirements, making it possible to sell digital products globally.
Who This Is Built For and Why

No-KYC digital product stores are designed for digital creators who face platform restrictions or banking limitations. This includes creators in countries like Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, Bangladesh, and Ethiopia, among others. It also includes solo developers who want to build a crypto-native digital product store. With no-KYC payments, you can expand your customer base, increase your revenue, and focus on creating high-quality digital products.
No-KYC digital product stores eliminate the need for traditional payment gateways and KYC requirements, allowing you to sell digital products globally.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The key components of a no-KYC digital product store include a payment processor, such as NOWPayments, a blockchain-based platform, and a digital product delivery system. The payment processor handles transactions, while the blockchain-based platform ensures the security and integrity of the transaction. The digital product delivery system automatically delivers the product to the buyer's wallet, eliminating the need for traditional payment gateways and KYC requirements.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal? You can sell an ebook online without PayPal by using a no-KYC digital product store, such as Unchained Commerce's Shop, which integrates with payment processors like NOWPayments, supporting 300+ cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and USDT. This eliminates the need for traditional payment gateways and KYC requirements.
Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) integrates a frontend wallet with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds, supporting 300+ cryptocurrencies.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for a platform to sell digital downloads without fees, consider using a no-KYC digital product store, like Unchained Commerce's Shop, which integrates with payment processors like NOWPayments, supporting 300+ cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and USDT. With Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99), you can easily integrate a frontend wallet with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds, allowing buyers to pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins. You can also sell digital products on your own website, using the Shop URL (https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html) as a starting point.
Your Action Checklist

To create a no-KYC digital product store, follow these steps: Choose a payment processor, such as NOWPayments, and integrate it with your website or online platform. Set up a blockchain-based platform to secure your transactions and ensure the integrity of your digital products. Configure your digital product delivery system to automatically deliver products to buyers' wallets. Use Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) to integrate a frontend wallet with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Test your no-KYC digital product store to ensure a seamless and secure buying experience for your customers.
NOWPayments supports 300+ cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and USDT, making it an ideal payment processor for no-KYC digital product stores.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
